name: Steamed Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dough ingredients until a smooth ball forms.
2. Cover and let rest for 30 minutes.
3. Roll out the dough into thin circles.
4. Place filling in the center of each circle.
5. Fold the edges to seal, creating a bun shape.
6. Steam the buns until cooked through.
7. Turn off the heat and serve hot.
